Cybersecurity Expert &
Bug Bounty Hunter and CTF Geek

                    

                        
Hi, I'm Ahmed (ShulkwiSEC)!

                        
💡 Security Specialist | Senior Software Engineer

                        
                        
    
                            
  • Expertise: Vulnerability research, penetration testing, and secure system architecture.
    • 
                            
  • Development Skills: 5+ years of experience in Python (Flask, FastAPI, Django), PHP, MySQL, SQLite, and frontend technologies like Angular, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS.
    • 
                            
  • Backend & API Development: Proficient in Nginx, server management, and building scalable, user-friendly web applications.
    • 
                            
  • Passion for Innovation: A problem-solver who thrives on tackling challenges and collaborating with teams.
    • 
                            
  • CTF Enthusiast: Always exploring cybersecurity challenges and competitions.
    • 
                        

                    
                        
🚀 Let's build something secure and scalable!
